description: Implement dynamic card height and title 2-line truncation across all card types: canvas cards, outline cards, and mobile sheet.
steps: Step 1 - Canvas cards in App.jsx: Remove min-h-[3rem] from the content area when node.content is empty. Only render the content div if the node has content or is being edited.
Step 2 - Title in canvas cards: Change from single-line input to a container that supports max 2 lines with ellipsis overflow truncation.
acceptance_criteria: Cards without content/description automatically reduce their height
Empty description area is not rendered (no empty space)
Long titles display max 2 lines with ellipsis truncation
Card height adjusts correctly for 1-line and 2-line titles
npm run build passes without errors
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/mind-map && npm run build` and confirm it completes with exit code 0
findings: Implementation complete. Canvas cards dynamically resize: empty content area is hidden with a minimal '+ Add notes...' hint. Title uses display/edit mode pattern with line-clamp-2 for 2-line truncation and ellipsis. Outline board cards and mobile sheet also updated. Build passes cleanly.
